title: jQuery UI Dialog - Default functionality
text:
ON CLICK: 	    	     ( EN )	 	   	    	    	    	    	 (?)   	   AI:   CATEGORIZE  *

HELP			  ALL FORMS
1	FREQ
1			  A BUNCH OF THINGS WERE	1
	0.621 seconds
tables:
Select entries below to add these to a "customized word list", and then later use this list as part of a search. For example, if you add 4 or 5 entries
below to the list myList, then you could use this as part of a search, like large @myList. More information:

Click on  below, and then click on any word in the highlighted entry, to see detailed information on the word.
To come back to this page, click on  on the "word page".
 [Close]

Click on
below to "save" this word or phrase. Then click on
at the top of the corpus to access this list at any point in the future.

 [Close]

By default, when you click on one of the words/phrases below, you will see the "Keyword in Context" view in the tab to the right.
But you can also now access "external" resources for any of the words/phrases that you see below. To do so, click on one of the types of resources above
(e.g. images or translation) and then click on the word/phrase below.
Note: To change the language for translation, click on the two letter code after
TRANSLATE above. This code will be saved for future access to the corpus as well. If it shows [??], you haven't yet selected a language.

  [Close]

In addition to the frequency of a word or phrase, you can also now see the number of texts in which it occurs. This can help you to eliminate words and phrases that
occur in just a few texts. To enable this feature, click on OPTIONS / SHOW # TEXTS in the search form (show me how).
More information
